titleStmt.title: SII 29.79: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 79. (A.R. No. B. 573 of 1961-62.) KURAḌI, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab kept in the Īśvara temple [No. 1].

It refers to the reign of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from the capital Jayantīpura. The purport of the record is the same as in No. 78 above. Further it adds that the temple of Nimbaṇēśvara was constructed by Nimbaṇayya. It mentions mahāmaṇḍḷēśvara kumāra Tailapa and records further grants by the donor for a dharmēta (Charitable picotta).
The date is same as in No. 78.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: [The slab is broken on top and top left side].

smara mukhābja do
vogedaṁ vaditōdyama
masāmartthyarakhiḷa vēdārtthama
dharāmara mukhyaru . Ā vaṁśadoḷu
hityavidu śrīva duraṁ sakaḷavacaśrī vaLetter va is written below the line.
(pra) . Ātana sati vimaḷaguṇōpēte dayānvite pa
jagadēka pūte vinītōttame ciṁcakabbe peṁpina niḷaya . (e)
vinayadamane dayeyamēre dharmmadakaṇi māntanada
poḷḷi vanālayakka nātmaje yādaḻu Āyabbe
śrī mallidēvana maḷayaśa sachāditaga
ya buganikhiḷa takha māṇikya . Āyuyya
naḷayaṁ śastra śāstra sāhitya kaḷājñānanidhi
nijavaṁśa maṁḍana niṁbarasa . Anavadya dhā
hājana mānūṟaṟuvadiṁbariṁ sakaḷakaḷādhanariṁda veḷa
nalesedudu karame rūḍivara sasyapada © svasti samasta bhu
(ya) śrī pṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājā(dhirā)ja paramēśvaraṁ
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśraya kuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrī matribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarōtta
rābhivṛddhi pravardhamānamācaṁdrārka tāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire ja
yaṁtēpurada nelevīḍiyoḷu sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ
geyyuttamire tatpāda padmōpajīvi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī
manmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kumāraṁ tailapadēvara śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ daṇḍanāyakaṁ niṁbaṇayyaṁgaḷu svasti śrīmaccāḷukya vikra
mavarṣada 47 neya subhakritu saṁvatsarada pu
ṣya ba 10 sōmavāra Uttarāyaṇa sankrāntiyaṁdu tāṁvu mā
ḍisida niṁbaṇēśvara dēvargge pūjegeṁ nivēdyakkaṁ naṁdādīvigegavāgi
śrīmatsarvvanamasyadagrahāraṁ rūḍiyalu tāṁvu munna
caṁdraśēkhara bhaṭṭarige krayavāgi koṭṭarddhavrittiyanu
tāmvu maguḷekoṁḍāyarddha vrittiyumaṁ
koṁmaṇayyana kaiyyalu koṁḍāyarddhavrittiya
lli prathama nivēśaṇa hoṟagāgi Arddha vṛttiyuma(ṁ) koṁ
ḍu vrittiyalli muppāgaṁ bēḷe vṛttiyaṁ baḷisahitaṁ dēvara śrī pā
dadalu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru . tamma hokharaṇeya dhammē
takke mattondu bēḷe vṛttiyaṁ bēḷe sahitaṁ biṭṭaru . Asagegeṟeya ba
ḍagaṇa kōḍiya mūḍalu nūṟu kaṁba niṁbaṇayya daṁḍanāyakara hokha
raṇeyiṁ teṁka nūṟu kaṁba Aṁtiṁnūṟu kaṁba tōṁṭa manittavarige mahājanaṁgaḷu biṭṭaru
svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēta vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jā
yatē krimi .Written at the end below Sketch of a dagger pointing downwards has been engraved after engraving the inscription from top to bottom.
Digital edition of SII 29.79 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
